title: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Asia Pacific Associates!
